title: 10 Moves a Godly Man Makes Before Anyone Gives Him Credit
caption:
Leadership in Christ doesn't start with a title. It starts with a thousand invisible moves no one's tracking.

The apology he makes first. The uncomfortable call no one else would make. The man he sits with when everyone else has moved on.

10 moves a godly man makes before anyone gives him credit:

1. He apologizes first.
2. He makes the uncomfortable call.
3. He serves quietly before there's a title.
4. He prays for the man he's struggling with.
5. He sits with the lowest man in the room.
6. He keeps his word to himself when no one knows he gave it.
7. He tells the truth when a lie would have been easier.
8. He shows up before he feels ready.
9. He does the work no one asked for.
10. He names God in what went right.

The man who does these things consistently is the man who gets trusted with more. Not because he was performing for an audience. Because there was no audience.

Save this. Pick one to do this week.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #leadership #discipline #christianleadership #scripture
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
